---
title: "SIR"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(devtools)
library(deSolve)
library(ggplot2)
devtools::load_all()
```

## Problem setup

SIR ODE: $$\dot{S} = -\beta S I, \quad \dot{I} = β S I - γ I, \quad \dot{R} = γ I$$ True parameters $p^* = (\beta,\ \gamma) = (0.3,\ 0.1)$.

```{r data}
f <- function(u, p, t) c(
  -p[1] * u[1] * u[2],
   p[1] * u[1] * u[2] - p[2] * u[2],
   p[2] * u[2]
)

p_star  <- c(0.3, 0.1)
u0      <- c(0.99, 0.01, 0.0)
npoints <- 64
t_span  <- c(0, 60)
tt      <- matrix(seq(t_span[1], t_span[2], length.out = npoints), ncol = 1)

modelODE <- function(tvec, state, parms) list(as.vector(f(state, parms, tvec)))
sol      <- deSolve::ode(y = u0, times = tt, func = modelODE, parms = p_star)
U_true   <- sol[, 2:4]

set.seed(42)
nr       <- 0.25
U_vec    <- as.vector(U_true)
noise_sd <- nr * sqrt(mean(U_vec^2))
U_noisy  <- U_true + matrix(rnorm(npoints * 3, sd = noise_sd), nrow = npoints)

cat(sprintf("n = %d   nr = %.2f   σ = %.4f\n", npoints, nr, noise_sd))
```

## Noisy data

```{r plot-data}
df_data <- data.frame(
  t  = as.vector(tt),
  S_true  = U_true[, 1],  I_true  = U_true[, 2],  R_true  = U_true[, 3],
  S_noisy = U_noisy[, 1], I_noisy = U_noisy[, 2], R_noisy = U_noisy[, 3]
)

ggplot(df_data, aes(x = t)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = S_noisy), colour = "steelblue",  size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(aes(y = I_noisy), colour = "firebrick",  size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(aes(y = R_noisy), colour = "darkgreen",  size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = S_true,  colour = "S"), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(aes(y = I_true,  colour = "I"), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(aes(y = R_true,  colour = "R"), linewidth = 0.9) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(S = "steelblue", I = "firebrick", R = "darkgreen")) +
  labs(title = sprintf("SIR — noisy observations (nr = %.2f, n = %d)", nr, npoints),
       x = "Time", y = "Proportion", colour = "Compartment") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Solve with WENDy JOINT

```{r solve, message=FALSE}
devtools::load_all()
res1 <- solveWendy(f, U_noisy, tt, method = "JOINT", control = list(smoother = "gp"))
res2 <- solveWendy(f, U_noisy, tt, method = "IRLS")

cat(sprintf("p*        = [%s]\n", paste(sprintf("%.4f", p_star),       collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("p̂_JOINT    = [%s]\n", paste(sprintf("%.4f", res1$phat),     collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("p̂_IRLS    = [%s]\n", paste(sprintf("%.4f", res2$phat),     collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Relative Coefficient Error JOINT = %.4f\n", rel_err(res1$phat, p_star)))
cat(sprintf("Relative Coefficient Error IRLS = %.4f\n", rel_err(res2$phat, p_star)))
```

## GP state estimate

```{r plot-ustar, message=FALSE}
gp_state <- gp_smooth(U_noisy, tt)
U_star   <- gp_state$U_star

df_state <- data.frame(
  t        = as.vector(tt),
  S_noisy  = U_noisy[, 1], I_noisy  = U_noisy[, 2], R_noisy  = U_noisy[, 3],
  S_true   = U_true[, 1],  I_true   = U_true[, 2],  R_true   = U_true[, 3],
  S_star   = U_star[, 1],  I_star   = U_star[, 2],  R_star   = U_star[, 3]
)

ggplot(df_state, aes(x = t)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = S_noisy), colour = "steelblue", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.35) +
  geom_point(aes(y = I_noisy), colour = "firebrick", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.35) +
  geom_point(aes(y = R_noisy), colour = "darkgreen", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.35) +
  geom_line(aes(y = S_true,  colour = "S true"),  linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(y = I_true,  colour = "I true"),  linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(y = R_true,  colour = "R true"),  linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(y = S_star,  colour = "S GP"),    linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_line(aes(y = I_star,  colour = "I GP"),    linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_line(aes(y = R_star,  colour = "R GP"),    linewidth = 1.0) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "S true" = "steelblue", "I true" = "firebrick", "R true" = "darkgreen",
    "S GP"   = "steelblue", "I GP"   = "firebrick", "R GP"   = "darkgreen"
  )) +
  labs(title = "GP smoothed state vs true signal",
       x = "Time", y = "Proportion", colour = "Series") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## HMC: Physics-informed posterior sampling

### Setup — build WENDy matrices and initialize

```{r hmc-setup, message=FALSE}
devtools::load_all()

# IRLS solve: get WENDy matrices + a good p0
res_irls <- solveWendy(f, U_noisy, tt, method = "IRLS")
p0       <- res_irls$phat
cat(sprintf("IRLS init:  beta=%.4f  gamma=%.4f\n", p0[1], p0[2]))
cat(sprintf("True:       beta=%.4f  gamma=%.4f\n", p_star[1], p_star[2]))

# GP smooth for U0
gp_state <- gp_smooth(U_noisy, tt)
U0       <- gp_state$U_star

# WENDy test-function matrices (convert from torch tensors to plain R)
Phi  <- as.matrix(res_irls$V)        # K x n
Phip <- as.matrix(res_irls$V_prime)  # K x n
sig  <- mean(as.numeric(res_irls$sig))  # scalar noise sd (sig may be length-D per-dim tensor)

n <- nrow(U_noisy)
D <- ncol(U_noisy)
J <- length(p0)

cat(sprintf("n=%d  D=%d  J=%d  K=%d  sig=%.4f\n", n, D, J, nrow(Phi), sig))
```

### Energy and gradient

```{r hmc-energy}
# Assemble F matrix: n x D, row i = f(U[i,], p, tt[i])
build_F_mat <- function(p, U) {
  t(sapply(seq_len(nrow(U)), function(i) f(U[i, ], p, tt[i])))
}

# Physics-informed posterior energy (negative log-posterior up to constant)
#   E = obs_term + phys_term + box_term
#   obs_term  = (1/2sig^2)  ||U_noisy - U||_F^2
#   phys_term = (1/2tau^2)  ||Phi F(p,U) + Phi' U||_F^2
#   box_term  = Inf if p outside [p_lower, p_upper]
tau     <- sig * 0.1     # physics 100x stronger than obs: tractable curvature, strong prior
p_lower <- c(0.0, 0.0)
p_upper <- c(2.0, 2.0)

energy <- function(p, U) {
  if (any(p < p_lower) | any(p > p_upper)) return(Inf)

  obs_term  <- 0.5 / sig^2 * sum((U_noisy - U)^2)

  Fmat      <- build_F_mat(p, U)
  resid     <- Phi %*% Fmat + Phip %*% U   # K x D
  phys_term <- 0.5 / tau^2 * sum(resid^2)

  obs_term + phys_term
}

# Flat interface: theta = c(p, vec(U)) column-major
theta_to_pU <- function(theta) {
  list(p = theta[seq_len(J)],
       U = matrix(theta[(J + 1L):length(theta)], nrow = n, ncol = D))
}

energy_flat <- function(theta) {
  pU <- theta_to_pU(theta)
  energy(pU$p, pU$U)
}

# Build (J+D+1) x n input matrix for vectorized symbolic fn calls
build_input_mat <- function(p, U) {
  rbind(
    matrix(rep(p, n),     nrow = J, ncol = n),
    t(U),
    matrix(as.vector(tt), nrow = 1, ncol = n)
  )
}

# Analytic gradient exploiting symbolic J_p and J_u from WENDy.
# Reshape convention mirrors build_Jp_r / build_L in wendy:
#   J_p -> (n, D, J): Jp_arr[m, d, j] = df_d/dp_j at time m
#   J_u -> (n, D, D): Ju_arr[m, a, b] = df_a/du_b at time m
grad_energy_analytic <- function(theta) {
  pU <- theta_to_pU(theta)
  p  <- pU$p
  U  <- pU$U
  X  <- build_input_mat(p, U)   # (J+D+1) x n

  Fmat <- build_F_mat(p, U)
  R    <- Phi %*% Fmat + Phip %*% U   # K x D

  # ── Gradient w.r.t. p ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Jp_arr <- as.array(
    torch::torch_tensor(res_irls$J_p(X))$reshape(c(n, D, J))$contiguous()
  )  # n x D x J R array

  gp <- numeric(J)
  for (j in seq_len(J)) {
    dF_dpj <- Jp_arr[,, j]              # n x D
    gp[j]  <- sum(R * (Phi %*% dF_dpj))
  }
  gp <- gp / tau^2

  # ── Gradient w.r.t. U ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  g_obs   <- (U - U_noisy) / sig^2   # n x D
  PhipT_R <- t(Phip) %*% R           # n x D
  PhiT_R  <- t(Phi)  %*% R           # n x D

  Ju_arr <- as.array(
    torch::torch_tensor(res_irls$J_u(X))$reshape(c(n, D, D))$contiguous()
  )  # n x D x D R array

  g_phys_nl <- matrix(0, n, D)
  for (i in seq_len(n))
    g_phys_nl[i,] <- PhiT_R[i,] %*% Ju_arr[i,,]   # 1xD %*% DxD

  gU <- g_obs + (g_phys_nl + PhipT_R) / tau^2
  c(gp, as.vector(gU))
}

# Verify analytic gradient against Richardson finite differences (O(h^4) accurate)
theta_test <- c(p0, as.vector(U0))
g_fd <- as.numeric(numDeriv::jacobian(energy_flat, theta_test, method = "Richardson"))
g_an <- grad_energy_analytic(theta_test)
cat(sprintf("Gradient check — max abs diff: %.2e  (rel: %.2e)\n",
            max(abs(g_fd - g_an)), max(abs(g_fd - g_an)) / (max(abs(g_fd)) + 1e-12)))

grad_energy <- grad_energy_analytic
```

### Leapfrog HMC step

```{r hmc-step}
# Dual averaging (Hoffman & Gelman 2014): adapts eps during burn-in to hit
# delta_target acceptance rate, then freezes epsbar for sampling.
# L_steps derived from fixed trajectory length T = L * eps.
T_traj       <- 0.2      # total path length — longer now that landscape is less stiff
eps_init     <- 1e-3    # starting step size — dual averaging will climb toward stable regime
delta_target <- 0.65    # target acceptance rate

da_init <- function(eps0) {
  list(eps = eps0, epsbar = eps0, Hbar = 0,
       mu = log(10 * eps0), gamma = 0.05, t0 = 10, kappa = 0.75)
}

da_update <- function(t, alpha, state) {
  w     <- 1 / (t + state$t0)
  Hbar  <- (1 - w) * state$Hbar + w * (delta_target - alpha)
  log_e <- state$mu - sqrt(t) / state$gamma * Hbar
  log_ebar <- t^(-state$kappa) * log_e + (1 - t^(-state$kappa)) * log(state$epsbar)
  modifyList(state, list(eps = exp(log_e), epsbar = exp(log_ebar), Hbar = Hbar))
}

hmc_step <- function(theta, eps) {
  L <- max(1L, round(T_traj / eps))
  r     <- rnorm(length(theta))
  H_old <- energy_flat(theta) + 0.5 * sum(r^2)

  th <- theta
  rv <- r - 0.5 * eps * grad_energy(th)
  for (l in seq_len(L)) {
    th <- th + eps * rv
    if (l < L) rv <- rv - eps * grad_energy(th)
  }
  rv <- rv - 0.5 * eps * grad_energy(th)

  # Reject if leapfrog diverged or p left the box
  p_prop <- th[seq_len(J)]
  if (!all(is.finite(th)) || any(p_prop < p_lower) | any(p_prop > p_upper)) {
    return(list(theta = theta, accepted = FALSE, alpha = 0, L = L))
  }

  H_new   <- energy_flat(th) + 0.5 * sum(rv^2)
  log_acc <- H_old - H_new
  alpha   <- min(1, exp(log_acc))

  if (is.finite(log_acc) && log(runif(1)) < log_acc) {
    list(theta = th,    accepted = TRUE,  alpha = alpha, L = L)
  } else {
    list(theta = theta, accepted = FALSE, alpha = alpha, L = L)
  }
}
```

### Run HMC

```{r hmc-run}
n_burn   <- 2000
n_sample <- 5000

theta_cur <- c(p0, as.vector(U0))
da        <- da_init(eps_init)

# ── Burn-in with dual-averaging eps adaptation ────────────────────────────────
message("=== Burn-in (", n_burn, " steps, adapting eps) ===")
n_acc <- 0L

for (i in seq_len(n_burn)) {
  out       <- hmc_step(theta_cur, da$eps)
  theta_cur <- out$theta
  n_acc     <- n_acc + out$accepted
  da        <- da_update(i, out$alpha, da)

  if (i %% 20 == 0) {
    p_cur <- theta_cur[seq_len(J)]
    message(sprintf("  burn %4d/%d | beta=%.4f  gamma=%.4f | eps=%.2e  L=%d | acc=%.2f",
                    i, n_burn, p_cur[1], p_cur[2], da$epsbar, out$L, n_acc / i))
    flush.console()
  }
}

eps_final <- da$epsbar
L_final   <- max(1L, round(T_traj / eps_final))
message(sprintf("Burn-in done. eps=%.2e  L=%d  acc=%.3f\n",
                eps_final, L_final, n_acc / n_burn))

# ── Sampling (eps and L frozen) ───────────────────────────────────────────────
message(sprintf("=== Sampling (%d steps, eps=%.2e  L=%d) ===",
                n_sample, eps_final, L_final))
samples   <- matrix(NA_real_, n_sample, J,
                    dimnames = list(NULL, c("beta", "gamma")))
U_samples <- array(NA_real_, dim = c(n_sample, n, D))  # posterior state draws
n_acc <- 0L

for (i in seq_len(n_sample)) {
  out          <- hmc_step(theta_cur, eps_final)
  theta_cur    <- out$theta
  n_acc        <- n_acc + out$accepted
  samples[i, ] <- theta_cur[seq_len(J)]
  U_samples[i,,] <- matrix(theta_cur[(J + 1L):length(theta_cur)], nrow = n, ncol = D)

  if (i %% 25 == 0) {
    p_cur <- theta_cur[seq_len(J)]
    message(sprintf("  sample %4d/%d | beta=%.4f  gamma=%.4f | acc=%.2f",
                    i, n_sample, p_cur[1], p_cur[2], n_acc / i))
    flush.console()
  }
}

message(sprintf("\nFinal acceptance rate : %.3f", n_acc / n_sample))
message(sprintf("Posterior mean        : beta=%.4f  gamma=%.4f",
                mean(samples[, "beta"]), mean(samples[, "gamma"])))
message(sprintf("True                  : beta=%.4f  gamma=%.4f",
                p_star[1], p_star[2]))
```

### Diagnostics

```{r hmc-diagnostics}
df_trace <- data.frame(
  iter  = seq_len(n_sample),
  beta  = samples[, "beta"],
  gamma = samples[, "gamma"]
)

p_trace_beta <- ggplot(df_trace, aes(x = iter, y = beta)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6, colour = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = p_star[1], colour = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Trace: beta", x = "Iteration", y = "beta") +
  theme_bw()

p_trace_gamma <- ggplot(df_trace, aes(x = iter, y = gamma)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6, colour = "firebrick") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = p_star[2], colour = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Trace: gamma", x = "Iteration", y = "gamma") +
  theme_bw()

p_hist_beta <- ggplot(df_trace, aes(x = beta)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = p_star[1], colour = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(samples[, "beta"]), colour = "navy",
             linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Posterior: beta", x = "beta", y = "count") +
  theme_bw()

p_hist_gamma <- ggplot(df_trace, aes(x = gamma)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "firebrick", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = p_star[2], colour = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(samples[, "gamma"]), colour = "darkred",
             linetype = "solid", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Posterior: gamma", x = "gamma", y = "count") +
  theme_bw()

gridExtra::grid.arrange(p_trace_beta, p_trace_gamma,
                        p_hist_beta,  p_hist_gamma, ncol = 2)

cat(sprintf("%-25s %8s %8s\n", "", "beta", "gamma"))
cat(sprintf("%-25s %8.4f %8.4f\n", "True p*",        p_star[1],                p_star[2]))
cat(sprintf("%-25s %8.4f %8.4f\n", "IRLS estimate",  p0[1],                    p0[2]))
cat(sprintf("%-25s %8.4f %8.4f\n", "Posterior mean", mean(samples[, "beta"]),  mean(samples[, "gamma"])))
cat(sprintf("%-25s %8.4f %8.4f\n", "Posterior sd",   sd(samples[, "beta"]),    sd(samples[, "gamma"])))
```
